typedef enum
{
  /* processor registers.  */
  dbs = MAX_REG, 
  dsr, dcrl, dcrh, 
  car0l, car0h, car1l, car1h, 
  cfg, psr, intbasel, intbaseh, 
  ispl, isph, uspl, usph,
  dcr =  dcrl, 
  car0 = car0l, 
  car1 = car1l, 
  intbase = intbasel, 
  isp =  ispl, 
  usp =  uspl,
  /* Not a processor register.  */
  nullpregister = usph + 1,
  MAX_PREG
}
